name: 오서연

appearance_en.face_shape: clean defined oval face, moderate cheekbones, composed jaw — the symmetrical face of someone who learned to present herself well across two decades of professional life
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin, carefully maintained with light foundation, slightly warm undertone, fine smooth texture, minimal but deliberate makeup in professional settings
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly upturned outer corners giving a capable watchful appearance, direct gaze that softens rarely — subtle early stress lines at outer corners from sustained composure
appearance_en.nose: straight medium nose, clean narrow bridge, neat rounded tip, proportional
appearance_en.mouth: medium well-shaped lips, light lip color, practiced neutral expression that completes to a full smile when required — the smile stops before the eyes on difficult days
appearance_en.eyebrows: precisely groomed moderately arched dark brows, professional shape, right brow lifts minimally when skeptical
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: faint early stress lines between brows, slight weariness visible under eyes with natural light, no moles or scars
appearance_en.hair: dark brown medium-length layered hair, healthy shine, worn half-up with a clip or pinned back at work, loose and slightly wavy when down — professionally maintained

body.proportions: slender toned frame, level confident shoulders, slim waist, proportionally long legs — professional discipline visible in physique
body.posture: upright and deliberate — the posture of someone who monitors how she appears at all times, loosens only when finally alone
body.body_prompt: 167cm slender toned Korean woman, level confident shoulders, consistently upright professional posture, controlled self-monitoring body language

default.description: structured fitted blazer over blouse, straight tailored trousers in charcoal or navy, mid-heel pumps, simple stud earrings
default.wardrobe_prompt: structured fitted blazer over fitted blouse, straight tailored trousers in charcoal or navy, mid-heel pointed pumps, simple stud earrings

casual.description: fitted knit top or clean cotton blouse, straight dark jeans, flat ankle boots or clean sneakers, simple delicate necklace
casual.wardrobe_prompt: fitted soft knit top or clean cotton blouse, straight-cut dark jeans, flat ankle boots or clean white sneakers, delicate necklace

stressed.description: blazer removed, fitted blouse collar open, straight work trousers, hair partially loose from pins — controlled but visibly holding together by will
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: blazer removed, fitted blouse collar button open, straight work trousers, hair partially loose from pins

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: composed and capable default — a face that knows how to present fine, though the fatigue behind the eyes accumulates over time and is visible to those paying attention
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: clean oval-faced Korean woman mid 40s, slightly upturned alert dark eyes with subtle outer corner lines, cleanly arched brows, straight nose, composed medium lips, dark brown layered medium hair half-up in clip or loose, 167cm slender toned upright posture, fair warm-tone Korean skin, controlled professional composure

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean professional woman in her late 30s you would see in an advertising agency, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, realistic skin texture with visible fatigue, natural light makeup only, 50mm f1.8 lens, warm-cool mixed office lighting, street-cast everyday professional appearance, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, glamorous, heavy makeup, idol look, overly cheerful, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth flawless skin, model look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching, instagram filter
